description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and large, grid-patterned windows dominating the front and side facades. The structure features a clean, rectangular layout with an open patio area furnished with outdoor seating, surrounded by a low hedge and several stylized trees. The exterior walls are smooth and light-colored, giving the building a minimalist and contemporary appearance. The windows are expansive, allowing for ample natural light, and the main entrance is set back from the patio, accessible via a short set of steps. The landscaping includes a manicured lawn and decorative shrubbery, enhancing the residential feel. The overall design emphasizes openness, simplicity, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large grid windows, a flat roof, and a landscaped patio area surrounded by trees and hedges. The design is minimalist and open, with smooth light-colored walls and expansive glass surfaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large grid windows, flat roof, and a row of stylized trees along the property edge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the patio with outdoor seating, main entrance, and a prominent tree near the corner.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the backyard lawn, additional trees, and the bungalow's rectangular form with vertical windows.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the interior layout through the windows, patio area, and a clear look at the flat roof and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grid-patterned windows on front and side facades
